name: Spike Rush
description: Dodge spikes, jump walls, fall into holes. Simple until it isnt. Speed keeps climbing, patterns get brutal, and suddenly youve been playing for 20 minutes wondering where the time went. Grab power-ups mid-run: Speed boost, Invincibility that smashes obstacles for points, 2× Score, and a Magnet that pulls everything to you. 10 skins. 22 achievements. One question: how far can you go?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
